calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-29-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Leutza for (executor) Stephen Peppler.

Mr. Leutza reported that the only outstanding issue is the preliminary distribution of proceeds of the retirement account, confirmed that it was taxable income to the estate, that they had to do it as a distribution of income citing 12006. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy C. Robles. (Not Reported)
